name: upkeep
description: macOS system cleanup and updater with an AI-driven update advisor. v1.4 replaces the four discovery-scout agents and the synthesizer agent with bundled bash scripts (scripts/discover.sh + scripts/synthesize.sh) — cuts discovery+plan wall time from ~2 minutes of LLM overhead to ~15 seconds of inline bash + jq (8x speedup), and adds `brew update` to the discovery path so the outdated list matches reality before approval. Enrichment agents (changelog-reader, project-impact) now gate on brew-major presence or medium+ compat-matrix risks — they no longer fire on gem-only or patch-heavy runs. v1.3 advisor preserved: changelog-reader, project-impact, failure-diagnoser. v1.2 prompt-injection hardening preserved: hardcoded dispatcher, discovery JSON sanitization, exact-match remote URL validation, trust-on-first-use for skill repos, Discover/Approve/Apply turn separation. v1.1 parallel discovery and Linux/WSL2 paths unchanged. Five entry points: deep, quick, audit, update, upkeep.
